div.p: Target: SSE2 __m128 (XMM) → scalar float using optimal bit-tree pattern. Constraint: Avoid SSE3 hadd_ps to minimize micro-op latency and maximize port pressure distribution.

ul.li: hadd_ps is micro-coded as multiple shuffles + adds (~2-3 uOps).
This manual tree exploits Port 0/1/5 concurrency.

div.p: movehl_ps logic: Copies bits [127:64] (high half) to bits [63:0] (low half).
add_ss (Scalar Single): Only sums the low 32-bits. (s0+s2) + (s1+s3)
